name: Cola Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, mix together the Coke, Wesson oil, 1/4 cup of Butter, and 1/4 cup Cocoa. Bring to a boil.
2. Remove from heat and add Marshmallows, stirring until melted.
3. In another bowl, combine Flour, Baking soda, Eggs, Sugar, and remaining 1/2 cup Butter with Vanilla.
4. Gradually mix in the Coke mixture into the flour mixture until well combined.
5. Pour batter into a greased 13 x 9-inch pan.
6. Bake for 30 to 35 minutes at 350°F (175°C) in the preheated oven.
7. Prepare icing by heating Coke and Cocoa to a boil, then pour over powdered Sugar and mix well.
8. Add chopped Nuts and pour over the hot cake and icing while still warm.
Note: Turn off heat sources once cooking is complete.
